name: rank
description: The rank of the current row with gaps
example: RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY event ORDER BY points)

name: dense_rank
description: The rank of the current row without gaps
example: DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY event ORDER BY points)

name: percent_rank
description: The relative rank of the current row as a fraction
example: PERCENT_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY event ORDER BY points)

name: cume_dist
description: The number of partition rows preceding or peer with current row / total partition rows.
example: CUME_DIST() OVER (PARTITION BY event ORDER BY points)
